questions.explanation: Miraj Begum and Aftab Iqbal were the children from Allama Iqbal’s first marriage with Karim Bibi.

questions.q: The Mughal Emperor who was defeated in the Battle of Buxar (1764) was?
questions.urdu: جنگِ بکسر 1764 میں شکست کھانے والا مغل بادشاہ کون تھا؟

questions.q: The Mughal Emperor who faced the Battle of Plassey indirectly through his Nawab was?

questions.q: The Battle of Khanwa (1527) was fought between Babur and?
questions.urdu: جنگِ خانوا 1527 میں بابر اور کس کے درمیان لڑی گئی؟

questions.q: The Mughal Emperor who issued the Farman granting the East India Company trading rights in Bengal?
questions.urdu: مغل بادشاہ جس نے ایسٹ انڈیا کمپنی کو بنگال میں تجارتی حقوق دینے کا فرمان جاری کیا؟

questions.q: The Zabt system of land revenue assessment in the Mughal era under Emperor Akbar was based on?

options: Measurement of land, classification of crops, and average produce

questions.q: Which Mughal emperor faced repeated invasions by Nadir Shah and Ahmad Shah Abdali, weakening the empire significantly?

questions.q: What is the binding requirement for a state that joins the Treaty on the Prohibition of Nuclear Weapons (TPNW) if it currently host nuclear weapons?
questions.urdu: اگر کوئی ریاست جو ایٹمی ہتھیار رکھتی ہو ٹی پی این ڈبلیو میں شامل ہو جائے تو اس پر کیا لازمی شرط عائد ہوتی ہے؟
options: It must conclude a safeguards agreement with the IAEA within 18 months
It must destroy them within exactly 5 years
It must remove and eliminate the weapons in accordance with legally binding time bound plan
